title: bromus ramosus var. serotinus
intro: Bromus ramosus var. serotinus, also known as false brome or autumn brome, is a perennial grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. The plant has been used to promote overall health and wellness, with benefits including reduced inflammation, improved digestion, and enhanced immune function. In herbal preparations, Bromus ramosus var. serotinus is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be dried and made into a powder for topical use.
